Auth.InvalidTokenMessage:
Could not verify your identity.
Try reloading the page or signing in again.
Auth.ForbiddenMessage:
Make sure your institution is enabled for this app and that your account has the User Manager role.
If you need access, contact SLSP Support.
Auth.ErrorMessage:
The service is currently unavailable.
Please try again later.

link.incompatible: Cannot link to selected personal account.

errors.PRIMARY_ID_DOMAIN_NOT_ALLOWED: The domain "{{domain}}" is not allowed for this institution.
errors.STAFF_USER_NOT_IN_IZ: User "{{almaPrimaryId}}" was not found in this institution.
errors.STAFF_USER_NOT_STAFF: User "{{almaPrimaryId}}" is not a staff user.
errors.PERSONAL_ACCOUNT_DUPLICATE: This staff user is already linked to an edu-ID.
errors.EDUID_ALREADY_LINKED_PERSONAL: This edu-ID is already linked to another personal account.
errors.ALMA_USER_NOT_FOUND: User "{{userId}}" was not found in Alma.
errors.ALMA_API_ERROR: An error occurred while communicating with Alma.
errors.ALMA_CONNECTION_ERROR: Could not connect to Alma. Please try again later.
errors.EDUID_ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND: Switch edu-ID account not found. Please verify the personal ID.
errors.EDUID_API_ERROR: Switch edu-ID service returned an error. Please try again later.
errors.EDUID_CONNECTION_ERROR: Cannot reach Switch edu-ID service. Please try again later.
errors.EDUID_EMAIL_MISMATCH: The email {{almaPrimaryId}} is not registered in edu-ID account {{eduIdPersonalId}}. For personal accounts, the Alma primary ID must match an email in the edu-ID account.
errors.EDUID_SYNC_FAILED: Switch edu-ID sync failed. Please try again later.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED: You are not authorized to perform this action.

listUsers.toggleDisableMessage: Disable the link for {{eduIdPersonalId}}? The user will not be able to authenticate via edu-ID while disabled.
listUsers.unlinkConfirmMessage: Permanently remove the link for {{eduIdPersonalId}}? This action cannot be undone.
